## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / tool / parser
- [ ] Documentation

## Checklist

- [ ] `./scripts/run_tests.sh` passes locally
- [ ] `ruff check` / `ruff format --check` clean for touched files
- [ ] No tool imports another tool's internals — crossing only via `contracts/`
- [ ] Generated TS contracts regenerated if schemas changed (`scripts/contracts_codegen.py`)
- [ ] No secrets, real evidence, or credentials committed
